blocks.body: Questions and Negations shows how to build questions, short answers, and negatives naturally.

blocks.heading: Question forms
blocks.body:
• Question Forms covers question structure.
  • Yes / No Questions and Wh-Questions give you the main patterns.
  • Question Tags and Negative Questions add checking and confirmation.

blocks.heading: Short answers
blocks.body:
• Answers to Questions covers short and full answers.
  • Short answers use the same auxiliary.
  • Wh-Questions and Negative Questions give you common answer practice.

blocks.heading: Question tags
blocks.body:
• Question Tags add a short tail at the end of a sentence.
  • The key points are tag form and intonation.
  • They help you check and confirm information.

blocks.heading: Topics in This Section
blocks.body:
TopicLevelDescription
Question FormsA1How to form questions
Yes / No QuestionsA1Questions with yes / no answers
Wh-QuestionsA1–A2Questions with question words
Answers to QuestionsA1–A2Short and full answers
Alternative QuestionsA2Questions with a choice
Question TagsB1Question tags
Negative QuestionsB1Negative questions

blocks.heading: Negation
blocks.body:
• Negation is part of questions and short answers.
  • Negative Questions have a separate lesson.
  • Start with don't / isn't / can't.

blocks.heading: Learning tips
blocks.body:
🧠

Start with Question Forms, Yes / No Questions, and Wh-Questions.

Then add the other question types.
